identity.mission: Create a professional, high-trust e-commerce experience that breaks the generic 'template' look through bold spacing, asymmetric grids, and tactile textures.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Architectural Precision' with 'Retail Warmth'.
Content is King: Every tile needs to feel like a piece of art.
Zoom In: Use high-res close-ups of textures.
Negative Space: Luxurious padding to signal premium quality.

headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero text, and product names. Tracking tight.

body.usage: Use for descriptions, prices, and UI elements. Relaxed line height.

accent.name: Construction Orange
accent.usage: Call-to-Actions (Add to Cart, Checkout), Sale Badges

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use py-16 or py-24 for sections. Gap-8 for grids.
layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A) for Categories. Strict Grid (Mode B) for Product Lists.
layout_strategy.hero_section: Full-width slider with text overlay. 600px-800px height.
layout_strategy.navigation: Mega-menu style with clear categories (Bathroom, Kitchen, Floor, Wall, Outdoor).

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-slate-900 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.product: group relative bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-300
cards.category: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl aspect-[4/5] or aspect-square group cursor-pointer

badges.sale: bg-red-600 text-white text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded uppercase tracking-wider
badges.new: bg-blue-600 text-white text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded uppercase tracking-wider

visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] for cards. shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.12)] for hover.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid slate-200. Use slate-900 for active states.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on hero sections to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React (already installed). Use thin strokes (1.5px) for elegance.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. NAVIGATION: Implement a 'Mega Menu' that opens on hover. It should show categories (Bathroom, Kitchen, etc.) and a featured image for each.
2. HERO: Build a custom Carousel using 'embla-carousel-react' or Shadcn Carousel. It must support video backgrounds if provided (use a placeholder video for now).
3. USP BAR: Below hero, add a 3-column bar: 'Free Samples', 'Next Day Delivery', 'Price Match'. Use icons.
4. CATEGORIES: Use the 'Bento Grid' layout (Mode A from guidelines). Make the 'Bathroom' category the dominant hero tile.
5. PRODUCTS: Create a 'Featured Products' section with a horizontal scroll/slider. Product cards must have a 'Quick View' button on hover.
6. BRANDS: Create a 'Marquee' section for brand logos using 'react-fast-marquee' or CSS animation.
7. FOOTER: Dark theme footer (slate-900) with 4 columns: Company, Support, Legal, Newsletter.
8. VIDEO: Add a section 'Watch Our Showroom' with a video player placeholder.
9. STORE LOCATOR: Add a prominent CTA or section for 'Find a Showroom' with a map placeholder image.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
All interactive elements must have data-testid.
